termsOfUse.title: Imigomo Yokusebenzisa
termsOfUse.welcome: Siyakwamukela ku-VirtualMD.app ("Isevisi", "Isayithi"), eqhutshwa yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "thina", "us", "yethu"). Le Migomo Yokusebenzisa ("Imigomo") ibusa ukufinyelela kwakho nokusebenzisa iwebhusayithi yethu, abantu be-AI, okuqukethwe, kanye nezinsizakalo. Ngokufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa Isevisi, uyavuma ukuboshwa yile Migomo kanye Nenqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo, efakwe lapha ngereferensi. Uma ungavumelani nale Migomo, ungayisebenzisi Isevisi.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Incazelo Yesevisi
serviceDescription.content: I-VirtualMD.app inikeza ukufinyelela kubantu be-AI abathuthukisiwe abaklanyelwe ukunikeza ulwazi oluhlobene nezempilo kanye nemininingwane esekelwe ezincwadini zezokwelapha, imihlahlandlela yomtholampilo, kanye nedatha yokuqeqeshwa kwe-AI. Isevisi ihloselwe izinjongo zolwazi nezemfundo kuphela.
serviceDescription._comment: IDINGA UKUHUMUSHWA: Kuqiniswe ukuze kugcizelele IZINHLOSO ZOLWAZI KUPHELA kanye nokuxoxisana nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqinisekisiwe

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Ukwamukelwa Kwemigomo
acceptanceOfTerms.content: Ngokubhalisela, ukufinyelela, ukuphequlula, noma ukusebenzisa Isevisi, uyavuma ukuthi ufundile, waqonda, futhi uyavuma ukuboshwa yile Migomo. Umele ukuthi uneminyaka yobudala esemthethweni ukuze wenze isivumelwano esibophezelayo. Ukusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi kuhlanganisa isiginesha yakho ye-elekthronikhi kule Migomo.

eligibility.title: 3. Ukufaneleka
eligibility.ageRequirement: Ukuze usebenzise isevisi ye-VirtualMD.app, kufanele okungenani ube neminyaka engu-18 ubudala noma ubudala beningi elisemthethweni endaweni yakho, kuye ngokuthi yikuphi okukhulu. Uma usebenzisa Isevisi esikhundleni senhlangano, uyamela futhi uyaqinisekisa ukuthi unegunya lokubophezela leyo nhlangano kule Migomo, futhi uyavuma ukuboshwa yile Migomo egameni laleyo nhlangano.
eligibility.legalCapacity: Kufanele futhi ube namandla asemthethweni ukuze ungene kule Migomo. Ngeke ukwazi ukufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa Isevisi uma unqatshelwe ukuthola izinsiza ngaphansi komthetho osebenzayo noma uke wamiswa okwesikhashana noma wasuswa eNsizakalweni nge-MindScript.
eligibility.territorialRestrictions: Ukufinyelela Isevisi kusuka ezindaweni lapho okuqukethwe kwayo noma ukusetshenziswa kwayo kungekho emthethweni kunqatshelwe ngokuphelele. Abasebenzisi banesibopho sokuthobela yonke imithetho yendawo, imithetho, neziqondiso mayelana nokusebenzisa kwabo Isevisi, okuhlanganisa leyo ehlobene nokuziphatha ku-inthanethi nokuqukethwe okwamukelekayo.

userAccounts.title: 4. Ama-Akhawunti Womsebenzisi Nokubhaliswa
userAccounts.registrationRequirements: Kungase kudingeke ukuthi ubhalise futhi udale i-akhawunti ukuze ufinyelele izici ezithile Zesevisi. Lapho ubhalisa, uyavuma ukunikeza ulwazi olunembile, lwamanje, nolwazi oluphelele mayelana nawe kanye nokugcina kanye nokubuyekeza ulwazi lwe-akhawunti yakho ngokushesha.
userAccounts.accountSecurity: Unesibopho sokugcina ubumfihlo bemininingwane ye-akhawunti yakho kanye nayo yonke imisebenzi eyenzekayo ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti yakho. Uyavuma ukwazisa ngokushesha i-MindScript nganoma yikuphi ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe kwe-akhawunti yakho nanoma yikuphi okunye ukwephulwa kwezokuphepha. I-MindScript ngeke ibe nesibopho sanoma yikuphi ukulahlekelwa noma umonakalo ovela ngenxa yokwehluleka kwakho ukuvikela ulwazi lwe-akhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountTermination: I-MindScript inelungelo lokumisa okwesikhashana noma ukunqamula ama-akhawunti aphula le Migomo noma nganoma yisiphi esinye isizathu ngokubona kwethu.
userAccounts.singleAccount: Umsebenzisi ngamunye angagcina i-akhawunti eyodwa kuphela. Ukudala ama-akhawunti amaningi omsebenzisi oyedwa akuvunyelwe ngaphandle uma kugunyazwe ngokucacile i-MindScript.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Amalungelo Empahla Yengqondo
intellectualProperty.ownershipRights: Isevisi nakho konke okuqukethwe kwayo, izici, nokusebenza (okuhlanganisa kodwa kungagcini kulo lonke ulwazi, isofthiwe, umbhalo, izibonisi, izithombe, ividiyo, umsindo, kanye nomklamo, ukukhethwa, nokuhlelwa kwakho) kuphethwe yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC, abanikezeli bayo bamalayisense, noma abanye abahlinzeki bezinto ezinjalo futhi zivikelwe yi-United States kanye ne-copyright yamazwe ngamazwe, uphawu lokuhweba, i-patent noma eminye imithetho yempahla eyimfihlo yebhizinisi, imfihlo yokuthengisa.
intellectualProperty.limitedLicense: Ngokuncike ekuthobeleni kwakho le Migomo, i-MindScript ikunikeza ilayisense ekhawulelwe, engakhethekile, engadluliseki, engaphendukiyo, ehoxiswayo ukuze ufinyelele futhi usebenzise Isevisi ukuze uyisebenzisele umuntu siqu, okungezona ezokuthengisa.
intellectualProperty.prohibitedUses: Ngaphandle kokuthi kuvunyelwe ngokucacile kule Migomo, awukwazi ukukhiqiza kabusha, usabalalisa, uguqule, udale imisebenzi esuselwe, uboniswe esidlangalaleni, wenze esidlangalaleni, ushicilele kabusha, udawunilode, ulondoloze, noma udlulise noma iziphi izinto Kusevisi yethu ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliwe ye-MindScript.
intellectualProperty.userContent: Ngokuthumela, ukuthumela, noma ukubonisa okuqukethwe ku-Service noma ngesevisi, unikeza i-MindScript ilayisense yomhlaba wonke, engakhethekile, yamahhala yokusebenzisa, ukukhiqiza kabusha, ukulungisa, ukulungisa, ukushicilela, ukuhumusha, ukudala imisebenzi esuselwe ukusuka, ukusabalalisa, nokubonisa okuqukethwe okunjalo ngenjongo yokusebenzisa kanye nokuthuthukisa Isevisi.
intellectualProperty.feedback: Noma yimiphi impendulo, ukuphawula, noma iziphakamiso ongazinikeza mayelana Nesevisi okokuzithandela ngokuphelele futhi sizokhululeka ukusebenzisa lezo mpendulo, ukuphawula, noma iziphakamiso ngendlela esibona kufanele ngayo ngaphandle kwesibopho kuwe.

acceptableUse.title: Inqubomgomo Yokusetshenziswa Eyamukelekayo
acceptableUse.intro: Uyavuma ukusebenzisa i-VirtualMD.app ngezinjongo ezisemthethweni kuphela nangokuhambisana nale Migomo. Uyavuma ukungasebenzisi Isevisi:

unlawful.title: Nganoma iyiphi inhloso engekho emthethweni
unlawful.description: Kubandakanya ukwephula noma yimuphi umthetho wenhlangano, wesifunda, wendawo, noma wamazwe ngamazwe osebenzayo.

advertising.title: Ukudlulisa, noma ukuzuza ukuthunyelwa, kwanoma iyiphi into yokukhangisa noma yokukhangisa
advertising.description: Ngaphandle kwemvume yethu ebhaliwe yangaphambilini, okuhlanganisa noma iyiphi 'i-imeyili engafuneki', 'incwadi ewuchungechunge', 'ugaxekile', nanoma ikuphi okunye ukucela okufanayo.

impersonate.title: Ukulingisa noma ukuzama ukuzenza i-MindScript
impersonate.description: Isisebenzi se-MindScript, omunye umsebenzisi, nanoma yimuphi omunye umuntu noma inhlangano.

nefarious.title: Ngezinjongo ezimbi zanoma yiluphi uhlobo
nefarious.description: Uvuma ngokucacile ukungasebenzisi Isevisi ukuze ufune ulwazi, isiqondiso, noma izindlela ezihlobene nokuzilimaza wena noma abanye. Lokhu kubandakanya, kodwa akugcini nje, ekucwaningeni izindlela zokuzilimaza, udlame, izenzo ezingekho emthethweni, nanoma yisiphi isenzo esingafaka wena noma omunye umuntu engozini. Ukusebenzisa inkundla ngezinjongo ezinjalo kuwukwephula le Migomo futhi kungase kuphumele ekunqanyulweni kwe-akhawunti ngokushesha futhi kubikwe kuziphathimandla ezifanele uma kusebenza.

interference.title: Nganoma iyiphi indlela ephazamisa ukusebenza kahle kweNkonzo
interference.description: Kubandakanya ukwethula amagciwane, amahhashi e-trojan, izikelemu, amabhomu anengqondo, noma okunye okunonya noma okulimaza ubuchwepheshe; uzama ukuthola ukufinyelela okungagunyaziwe, ukuphazamisa, ukulimaza, noma ukuphazamisa noma yiziphi izingxenye Zesevisi, iseva lapho Isevisi egcinwe khona, nanoma iyiphi iseva, ikhompuyutha, noma isizindalwazi esixhunywe Kusevisi.

harmOthers.title: Ukulimaza noma ukuzama ukulimaza abanye
harmOthers.description: Kubandakanya kodwa okungakhawulelwe ekusebenziseni ulwazi oluvela Kusevisi ukuze kubangele ukulimala ngokomzimba, ngokomzwelo, noma kwengqondo kunoma yimuphi umuntu.

harmAnimals.title: Ukulimaza noma ukuzama ukulimaza izilwane
harmAnimals.description: Kubandakanya ukusebenzisa Isevisi ukuthola ulwazi oluhloselwe ukudala ukuhlupheka, ukulimala, noma ukufa kunoma yisiphi isilwane.

asIs.title: 1. Isevisi Ehlinzekiwe "NJENGOBA INJE"; ULWAZI KUPHELA
asIs.content: Ulwazi namasevisi ahlinzekwa i-VirtualMD.app, okuhlanganisa konke okuqukethwe okukhiqizwa abantu be-AI, kunikezwa "NJENGOBA YIKHO" kanye "NJENGOBA IYATHOLAKALA" NGENHLOSO YOLWAZI NEZEMFUNDO KUPHELA. I-MindScript ayenzi izethulo noma iziqinisekiso zanoma yiluphi uhlobo, ezivezwayo noma ezishiwoyo, mayelana nokusebenza Kwesevisi noma ulwazi, okuqukethwe, izinto zokwakha, noma imikhiqizo efakwe Kusevisi. Uyavuma ngokucacile ukuthi ukusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi kusengozini yakho kuphela.
asIs.warning: I-VirtualMD.app ISELULEKO KUPHELA. AKUTHATHI indawo yeseluleko sezokwelapha esiqeqeshiwe, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa okuvela kumhlinzeki wezempilo oqeqeshiwe. Ngaso sonke isikhathi funa iseluleko sikadokotela wakho noma omunye umhlinzeki wezempilo oqeqeshiwe nganoma yimiphi imibuzo ongase ube nayo mayelana nesimo sezempilo. Ungalokothi ushaye indiva iseluleko sezokwelapha esichwepheshile noma ubambezeleke ukusifuna ngenxa yento oyifundile noma ohlanganyele nayo Kusevisi.
asIs.limitations: I-MindScript ayinikezi ukuxilonga noma ukwelashwa. Okuqukethwe okukhiqizwa yi-AI kungase kuqukathe amaphutha noma okukhishiwe ngaphandle kwezinqubo zethu zokuqinisekisa. Iseluleko sezokwelapha sidinga ukuhlolwa komuntu siqu ngabahlinzeki bezempilo abanelayisensi. Ulwazi lwezempilo lungase luphelelwe yisikhathi. Umlando wakho wezokwelapha oyingqayizivele udinga ukuhlolwa kochwepheshe.
asIs.fdaWarning: Isevisi, okuqukethwe kwayo, kanye nabantu bayo be-AI AKUVUNYELWE yi-U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) nanoma yimuphi omunye umkhandlu olawulayo njengedivayisi yezokwelapha noma ngezinjongo zokuxilonga noma zokwelashwa.
asIs._comment: IDINGA UKUHUMUSHWA: Kushintshwe 'iseluleko' kwaba 'ulwazi' kulo lonke, kugcizelele ukubonisana nochwepheshe bezempilo abaqinisekisiwe

noHipaa.title: 2. Akukho Ukuthobelana kwe-HIPAA Kokusetshenziswa Okujwayelekile
noHipaa.content: Uvuma ngokucacile futhi uyavuma ukuthi i-VirtualMD.app, ekunikezeni kwayo isevisi ebheke kumthengi okuvamile, AYIYONA INKONZO EYATHOBELA I-HIPAA ngezinjongo zokusetshenziswa Izinkampani Ezikhaviwe ze-HIPAA noma Ababambisene Nabo Bebhizinisi abaphethe Ulwazi Lwezempilo Oluvikelekile (PHI) njengoba kuchazwe ngaphansi koMthetho Wokuphatheka Nokuziphendulela Wezempilo (HIPAA6) (HIPAA6).
noHipaa.details: Nakuba i-MindScript isebenzisa izinyathelo eziqinile zokuphepha (ezinemininingwane esigabeni Senqubomgomo Yobumfihlo), ukwakheka kwenkundla, ukuphathwa kwedatha, nezinqubo zokusebenza zesevisi evamile azihlangabezani nezimfuneko ezithile zokulawula, ezingokwenyama, nezokuvikela ezigunyazwe Umthetho Wokuphepha we-HIPAA wokuphatha i-PHI Ngamabhizinisi Akhaviwe noma Abalingani Bebhizinisi abasebenzela yona ngaphandle kweSivumelwano Esithile esinikezelwe Ibhizinisi endaweni ethile ye-BA.
noHipaa.agreement: Ngokusebenzisa Isevisi, uyavuma ukuthi NGEKE uyisebenzisele ukugcina, ukucubungula, noma ukudlulisa i-PHI ngendlela engadinga ukuthobela kwe-HIPAA ngasohlangothini lwe-MindScript, ngaphandle uma ungene ku-BAA ehlukile, evumelekile ne-MindScript Technologies, LLC ngenjongo ethile, okuvunyelwene ngayo. Uyavuma ukuthi izinga elisebenzayo lokuvikela idatha lolwazi olunikezayo elezinqubo zokuphepha zebhizinisi ezinengqondo ngaphakathi kwe-United States, hhayi izindinganiso ezithile ezigunyazwe i-HIPAA ye-PHI.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Umkhawulo Wesibopho Sezomthetho Mayelana Nokuphepha Kwedatha
dataSecurity.content: I-MindScript isebenzisa izinyathelo zokuphepha ezinengqondo zezentengiso, okuhlanganisa ukubethela kanye nezivumelwano zokuqinisekisa (njengoba kuchazwe kuNqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo), ukuvikela ulwazi olunikeza Isevisi. Nokho, alukho uhlelo lwezokuphepha olungangeneki.
dataSecurity.warning: Ngakho-ke, ngokusebenzisa le Sayithi, uvuma ngokucacile futhi uyavuma ukuthi nakuba i-MindScript izokwenza imizamo efanele yokuvikela idatha yakho ngokuhambisana nezinqubo ezijwayelekile zebhizinisi, ASIQINISEKISI UKUPHEPHA OKUPHELELE KOKUPHEPHA ULWAZI LAKHO. Uyavuma ukuthi AWUKWAZI FUTHI NGEKE UBUHELE NOMA UKUBAMBA I-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, ITS AFILITES, ABAKHULU, ABAQONDISI, ABASEBENZI, AMA-AGENENT, NOMA AMALAYISENSI ABOPHEZELE noma yimuphi umonakalo, ukulahlekelwa, izindleko, noma izindleko ezivela ngenxa noma ngokuhlobene nanoma yikuphi ukufinyelela okungagunyaziwe, ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe, imininingwane edaluliwe. (okuhlanganisa nokuphulwa kwedatha), inqobo nje uma i-MindScript isebenzise izinyathelo zokuphepha ezifanele. Ukusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi kuhlanganisa ukwamukela kwakho lobu bungozi.

generalLiability.title: 4. Umkhawulo Ojwayelekile Wesikweletu
generalLiability.content:
NGOKUGCWELE NGEZINGA LOKUGCWELE IMTHETHO OSEBENZAYO, AKUKHO MCIMBI OKUZOMELE I-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, AMA-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, IZINHLOBO ZAYO, IZIKHULU, ABAQONDISI, ABASEBENZI, AMA-EJENSI, NOMA ABAMELASENSI BABOPHEZWE NGANOMA YIYIPHI I-INDIRECT, I-INDIRENTAL, INCINIDAL, INDLELA YOKUZIPHATHA. UMONAKALO OYISIJEZISO, NOMA YIKUPHI UKULAHLEKELWA KWEZINZUZO NOMA OKUNGEZESIFUNDAZWE, KUNGAKHATHALISEKI ukuthi KWENZEKE NGOKUQONDILE NOMA NGAPHAMBILI, NOMA YIKUPHI UKULAHLEKELWA KWEDATHA, UKUSETSHENZISWA, I-GOODWILL, NOMA OKUNYE UKULAHLEKELWA OKUNGANGEKE KUBANGELEKILE, OKUVELA:

UKUFINYELELA KWAKHO NOMA UKUSEBENZISA NOMA UKUNGAKWAZI UKUFINYELELA NOMA UKUSEBENZISA INKONZO;
NOMA YIKUPHI UKUZIPHATHA NOMA OKUQUKETHWE KWANOMA YILUPHI IQEMBU LESITHATHU ENKONZWENI, KUHLANGANISA NGAPHANDLE KOMKHAWULO, NOMA YIKUPHI Ukuhlambalaza, Okuhlaselayo, NOMA UKUZIPHATHA OKUNGEMTHETHWENI KWABANYE ABASEBENZISI NOMA IQEMBU LESITHATHU;
NOMA YIKUPHI OKUQUKETHWE OKUTHOLAKILE ENKONZO; NOMA
UKUFINYELELA OKUNGAKUGUNYAZWA, UKUSETSHENZISWA, NOMA UKUSHINTSHA UKUDLULISELA KWAKHO NOMA OKUQUKETHWE (KUHLANGANISA UKWEPHUKILE KWEDATHA), NOMA INGABE I-MINDSCRIPT ISEBENZE IZIQINISEKISO ZOKUvikeleka EZIPHUMELELE NJENGOBA ZISHIYWE KULE MIBANDELA KANYE NENQUBOMGOMO YOBUMFIHLO.

NGENXA ESIPHELELE NGENXA YEMTHETHO, IMINDSCRIPT IZINDLULELA ZONKE IZIQINISEKISO, EZISHIYELWE NOMA EZISHIWO, KUHLANGANISA, KODWA AKUkhawulelwe, IZIQINISEKISO EZISHIYILE ZOKUTHENGISA, UKULUNGELA INJONGO ETHILE, NENHLOSO, INHLOSO, INHLOSO, INHLOSO, INHLOSO.

AKUKHO MCIMBI NGENXA YESIBOPHO IMANDLA EYI-MINDSCRIPT KANYE NEZINHLANGANO ZAYO EZINGAPHEZU KOKUKHULU KWAMADOLLA ASE-U.S. AYIKHULU ELIYAYIKHULU (USD $100.00) NOMA IMALI OYIKHOKHELWE IMINDSCRIPT, UMA LIKHONA, EMINYANGENI ESITHUPHA ESIDLULE.

IMIKHAWULO YALESI SIGATSHA IZOSEBENZA KUNOMA YIMUPHI UMBONO WOKUBOPHEZELA, KUNGAKHATHALISEKILE ESIQINISEKISO, IMVUMELWANO, UMTHETHO, I-TORT (KUHLANGANISA NOBUDEBESHI), NOMA OKUNYE, FUTHI KUNGATHI IMINDONGO YEMPENDULO YENZA ULWAZI KANYE NOBUMTHETHO, KANYE NOBUHLUNGU. ISIKHAMBI ESIBEKWE LAPHA KUTHOLAKALA ESINGAPHUMELELE INHLOSO YALO EBALULEKILE.

EZINYE IZINDAWO AYIKUVUMELI UKUNGABANDWA KWEZIQINISEKISO EZITHILE NOMA UMKHAWULO NOMA UKUNGABAMBI KOMTHETHO NGOKWEZIGEBEKO NOMA OKULANDELAYO. NGOKUVILAYO, EMINYE YALE MIKHAWULO EPHEZULU ingase INGASEBENZI KUWE.

emergency.title: 5. Izimo eziphuthumayo
emergency.content: I-VirtualMD.app AYIKWAZI ukukusukumela esimweni esiphuthumayo. Uma isistimu iphakamisa ukuthi ushayele abezimo eziphuthumayo (isb., 911, 999, 101, 000) noma ufune usizo lwezokwelapha olusheshayo, nguwena kuphela onesibopho sokuthatha leso senzo. Isevisi ayithumeli izinsiza eziphuthumayo. Hlala uthembele ezinsizeni eziphuthumayo zendawo ukuze uthole izidingo eziphuthumayo zezokwelapha.

privacyPolicy.title: Inqubomgomo yobumfihlo
privacyPolicy.intro: Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi i-MindScript Technologies, LLC iqoqa, isebenzise, ​​futhi idalule kanjani ulwazi ngawe ngewebhusayithi yethu ye-VirtualMD.app namasevisi. Le nqubomgomo ifakwe kuMigomo yethu Yokusebenzisa.

dataPledge.title: 1. Isithembiso Sethu Sobumfihlo Bedatha
dataPledge.content: Kuhlelo lokusebenza lwe-VirtualMD, ubumfihlo nokuvikeleka kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kubaluleke kakhulu. Sizibophezele ekugcineni ubumfihlo nobuqotho bedatha osiphathise yona. Inkundla yethu iklanywe ngezinyathelo zokuphepha eziqinile ukuze kuvikelwe ulwazi lwakho ekufinyeleleni okungagunyaziwe, ukudalulwa, ukuguqulwa, nokucekelwa phansi.

security.title: Imizamo yokuvikela:
security.description: Sisebenzisa amaphrothokholi okubethela asezingeni lomkhakha ngedatha kwezokuthutha nasendaweni yokuphumula, eduze nezakhiwo zokuphepha ezinezendlalelo eziningi ezihlanganisa i-2FA eyisibopho.

noPII.title: Akukho Ukusetshenziswa Kwangaphandle kwe-PII:
noPII.description: Asilusebenzisi ulwazi lwakho nganoma iyiphi indlela ongamhlonza ngayo ngezinjongo zangaphandle ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile.

noSale.title: Akukho Ukuthengiswa Kolwazi Lomuntu Siqu:
noSale.description: Asisoze sathengisa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kwabanye abantu.

anonymized.title: Idatha Engaziwa Yokuthuthukisa:
anonymized.description: Sisebenzisa idatha eqinile engaziwa nehlanganisiwe (isuswe yonke i-PII) ukuze sithuthukise ukunemba, ukusebenza kahle, nokuphepha kwamamodeli wethu we-AI nezici zeplathifomu. Lokhu akuvumeli ukukhonjwa kwanoma yimuphi umsebenzisi ngamunye.

infoCollection.title: 2. Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo kanye Neminye Imininingwane Yobumfihlo
infoCollection.content: Siqoqa ulwazi osinikeza lona ngokuqondile, ulwazi esiluqoqa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi, kanye nolwazi oluvela emithonjeni yezinkampani zangaphandle.
infoCollection.accountInfo: Ulwazi Lwe-akhawunti: Uma ubhalisa, siqoqa ulwazi olufana negama lakho, ikheli le-imeyili, nenombolo yocingo (ngezinjongo zokuqinisekisa).
infoCollection.userContent: Okuqukethwe Kwabasebenzisi: Siqoqa ulwazi olunikezayo lapho usebenzisa Isevisi, okuhlanganisa umbhalo ofakwe ku-interface yengxoxo, ulwazi lwephrofayela (njengohlu lwemithi, uma lunikeziwe), kanye nempendulo.
infoCollection.usageInfo: Ulwazi Lokusetshenziswa: Siqoqa ngokuzenzakalela ulwazi mayelana nokusebenzisana kwakho Nesevisi, njengekheli le-IP, uhlobo lwesiphequluli, ulwazi lwedivayisi, isistimu yokusebenza, amakhasi abukiwe, izixhumanisi ezichofoziwe, kanye nezinsuku nezikhathi zokuvakasha kwakho.
infoCollection.cookies: Amakhukhi kanye Nobuchwepheshe Obufanayo: Sisebenzisa amakhukhi nobuchwepheshe bokulandelela okufanayo ukuze silandelele umsebenzi Kusevisi yethu futhi sibambe ulwazi oluthile. Ungayalela isiphequluli sakho ukuthi senqabe wonke amakhukhi noma sibonise lapho kuthunyelwa ikhukhi. Nokho, uma ungawamukeli amakhukhi, ungase ungakwazi ukusebenzisa ezinye izingxenye Zesevisi yethu.

howWeUse.title: Indlela Esisebenzisa Ngayo Ulwazi
howWeUse.intro: Sisebenzisa ulwazi esiluqoqayo ngezinjongo ezihlukahlukene, ezihlanganisa:

howWeShare.title: Indlela Esabelana Ngayo Ulwazi
howWeShare.vendors: Nabathengisi Nabahlinzeki Besevisi: Singase sabelane ngolwazi nabathengisi bezinkampani zangaphandle, abaxhumanisi, nabanye abahlinzeki besevisi abadinga ukufinyelela kulwazi olunjalo ukuze basiqhubele umsebenzi.
howWeShare.legal: Ekuphenduleni Inqubo Yezomthetho: Singase sidalule ulwazi uma kudingeka ngokomthetho ukwenza kanjalo noma ngenkolelo enhle yokuthi isenzo esinjalo siyadingeka ukuze sihambisane nesibopho esingokomthetho.
howWeShare.consent: Ngemvume Yakho: Singase sabelane ngolwazi ngemvume yakho noma ngokuyala kwakho.
howWeShare.businessTransfers: Ukudluliswa Kwebhizinisi: Singase sabelane noma sidlulise ulwazi mayelana nanoma yikuphi ukuhlanganiswa, ukuthengiswa kwempahla yenkampani, ukuxhasa ngezimali, noma ukutholwa.
howWeShare.aggregated: Idatha Ehlanganisiwe Noma Engakhonjwa: Singase sabelane ngolwazi oluhlanganisiwe noma olungakhonjwa, olungeke lusetshenziswe ngokuphusile ukukuhlonza.

choices.title: Izinketho Zakho Zobumfihlo
choices.accountInfo: Ulwazi Lwe-akhawunti: Ungabuyekeza, ulungise, noma ususe ulwazi olumayelana nawe noma kunini ngokungena ku-akhawunti yakho noma ngokusithinta.
choices.deletion: Ukususwa Kwedatha: Unamathuluzi okususa unomphela izingxoxo ngazinye noma i-akhawunti yakho yonke.
choices.cookies: Amakhukhi: Iziphequluli eziningi zewebhu zisethelwe ukuthi zamukele amakhukhi ngokuzenzakalelayo. Ngokuvamile ungakhetha ukusetha isiphequluli sakho ukuthi sisuse noma senqabe amakhukhi esiphequluli.
choices.promotional: Ezokuxhumana Zokukhangisa: Ungakhetha ukuphuma ekutholeni ama-imeyili okukhangisa avela ku-MindScript ngokulandela imiyalelo kulawo ma-imeyili.

infoCollection.retention: Ukugcinwa Kwedatha: Sigcina ulwazi esiluqoqayo ngawe isikhathi eside njengoba kudingekile ngezinjongo esiluqoqele yona ekuqaleni. Sigcina imininingwane ye-akhawunti inqobo nje uma i-akhawunti yakho isebenza kanye nesikhathi esiphusile ngemuva kwalokho.
infoCollection.international: I-International Data Transfers: I-MindScript izinze e-United States, futhi sicubungula futhi sigcine ulwazi e-U.S. Ngokusebenzisa Isevisi, uyavuma ukuthi ulwazi lwakho ludluliselwe e-U.S.
infoCollection.children: Ubumfihlo Bezingane: Isevisi ihloselwe abantu abadala futhi ayiqondiswe ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13. Asiqoqi ngamabomu ulwazi lomuntu siqu ezinganeni.

securityPractices.title: 5. Imikhuba Yokuphepha ye-VirtualMD.app

password.title: Ukubhalwa Kwephasiwedi:
password.description: Amaphasiwedi abethelwe kusetshenziswa ama-algorithms e-hashing asezingeni lomkhakha.

twoFactor.title: Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Ezimbili (2FA):
twoFactor.description: Kuyisibopho kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti, kudinga ukuqinisekiswa ngesici sesibili (isb., ikhodi ku-imeyili/ifoni).

threeFactor.title: Inketho ye-Three-Factor Authentication (3FA):
threeFactor.description: Ukuphepha okuthuthukisiwe ongakukhetha okudinga iphasiwedi, ikhodi ye-imeyili, KANYE nekhodi ye-SMS.

dataEncryption.title: Ukubethelwa Kwedatha:
dataEncryption.description: Ulwazi (kuhlanganise nezingxoxo) lubethelwa lapho uphumule futhi usendleleni (TLS/SSL).

deletion.title: Ukususwa Kwedatha Unomphela:
deletion.description: Ungakwazi ukususa unomphela izingxoxo ngazinye noma i-akhawunti yakho yonke. Ulwazi olususiwe alubuyiseki kumasistimu ethu ayinhloko.

access.title: Izilawuli Zokufinyelela:
access.description: Ukufinyelela kumarekhodi esizindalwazi somsebenzisi ngabasebenzi kulawulwa ngokuqinile, kunqunyelwe, kufakwe, futhi kubuswa izinqubomgomo zangaphakathi. Ukuphequlula okujwayelekile akuvunyelwe.

securityPractices.conclusion: Lezi zinyathelo zinikeza ukuvikeleka kwe-akhawunti okuqinile, kodwa khumbula ukuthi ayikho isistimu evikeleke ngo-100%.

hipaaReiteration.title: 6. I-VirtualMD.app kanye nokucatshangelwa kwe-HIPAA (Ukuphindaphinda)
hipaaReiteration.content: Njengoba kushiwo kokuthi Ukuzihlangula, insizakalo evamile ye-VirtualMD.app AYIHAYI i-HIPAA ethobelana nezimo zokusebenzisa Ibhizinisi Elikhaviwe / Inhlangano Yebhizinisi ehlanganisa i-PHI ngaphandle kwe-BAA ethile. Nakuba sisebenzisa ukuvikeleka okuqinile, isevisi yethu evamile isebenza ngaphansi kwezinqubo zokuphepha ezijwayelekile zebhizinisi, hhayi izimfuneko ezithile Zomthetho Wokuphepha we-HIPAA we-PHI ephethwe Amabhizinisi Akhaviwe.
hipaaReiteration.warning: Abasebenzisi abadinga ukuthotshelwa kwe-HIPAA okuqinile kwe-PHI abayiphethe akufanele basebenzise inkundla yethu evamile ngezinjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kwe-BAA. Abasebenzisi akumele bafake ulwazi olungalandelelwa esigulini ngasinye esimongweni esiphula i-HIPAA ngaphandle kwemvume ecacile, enolwazi oluvumayo isimo senkundla sokungathobeli se-HIPAA salokho kusetshenziswa.

thirdParty.title: 7. Ukusetshenziswa Kwedatha Abahlinzeki Benjini Ye-AI Yeqembu Lesithathu
thirdParty.intro: I-MindScript ihlanganisa nabahlinzeki bemodeli ye-AI abahamba phambili (isb., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google).

mindscript.title: I-VirtualMD.app:
mindscript.description: Sisebenzisa kuphela idatha engaziwa, ehlanganisiwe ukuze kuthuthukiswe isistimu yangaphakathi.

providers.title: Abahlinzeki be-Third Party AI API:
providers.description: Abahlinzeki abakhulu abafinyelelwa nge-API (njenge-OpenAI, Anthropic) ngokuvamile bathi kuzinqubomgomo zabo idatha ethunyelwe nge-API AYI isetshenziselwe ukuqeqesha amamodeli abo ayisisekelo. Silungiselela ukusebenzisa kwethu lezi zinsiza ukuze kuhambisane nalezi zinketho zokulondoloza ubumfihlo. Buyekeza izinqubomgomo zabo ezithile ukuze uthole imininingwane.

changesToTerms.title: Izinguquko Zale Migomo Nenqubomgomo
changesToTerms.content: Singase sibuyekeze futhi sibuyekeze le Migomo ngezikhathi ezithile ngokubona kwethu. Zonke izinguquko zisebenza ngokushesha lapho sizithumela, futhi zisebenza kukho konke ukufinyelela nokusebenzisa Isevisi ngemva kwalokho.
changesToTerms.notice: Ukuqhubeka kwakho nokusebenzisa Isevisi kulandela ukuthunyelwa Kwemigomo ebuyekeziwe kusho ukuthi uyazamukela futhi uyavumelana nezinguquko. Kulindeleke ukuthi uhlole leli khasi njalo ukuze wazi noma yiziphi izinguquko, njengoba zibophezela kuwe.
changesToTerms.materialChanges: Uma senza izinguquko ezibonakalayo kule Migomo, sizokwazisa nge-imeyili kanye/noma ngokuthumela isaziso Kusevisi ngaphambi kokuthi ushintsho luqale ukusebenza.

termination.title: Ukunqanyulwa
termination.userTermination: Unganqamula i-akhawunti yakho futhi uyeke ukusebenzisa Isevisi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokulandela imiyalelo engaphakathi Kwesevisi noma ngokusithinta.
termination.serviceTermination: I-MindScript, ngokubona kwayo iyodwa, ingamisa noma inqamule ukufinyelela kwakho konke noma ingxenye Yesevisi, ngesaziso noma ngaphandle kwanoma yisiphi isizathu, okuhlanganisa ukwephulwa kwale Migomo.
termination.effectOfTermination: Ngemva kokunqanyulwa, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa Isevisi lizophela ngokushesha. Zonke izinhlinzeko zeMigomo okufanele ngokwemvelo yazo ziqhubeke nokunqanyulwa zizoqhubeka nokuqedwa.
termination.noLiability: Ngeke sibe nesibopho kuwe noma kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesithathu nganoma yikuphi ukunqanyulwa kokufinyelela kwakho Kusevisi.

governingLaw.title: Umthetho Ophethe kanye Nokuxazululwa Kwezingxabano
governingLaw.governingLaw: Le Migomo izobuswa futhi ihunyushwe ngokuvumelana nemithetho Yesifunda SaseDelaware, ngaphandle kokubheka ukungqubuzana kwayo kwezimiso zomthetho.
governingLaw.jurisdiction: Uyavuma ukuhambisa endaweni yomuntu siqu nekhethekile yezinkantolo ezitholakala ngaphakathi kweNew Castle County, Delaware.
governingLaw.arbitration: Noma iyiphi ingxabano ephakama ngenxa noma ehlobene nale Migomo noma Isevisi izoxazululwa ngesixazululi esiyisibopho ngokuvumelana Nemithetho Yokuxazululwa Kwezohwebo ye-American Arbitration Association.
governingLaw.classAction: Uyavuma ukuthi noma yiziphi izinyathelo zokuxazulula izingxabano zizoqhutshwa umuntu ngamunye futhi hhayi ngesigaba, isenzo esihlanganisiwe, noma sokumela abanye.
governingLaw._comment: IDINGA UKUHUMUSHWA: Ibuyekezelwe emthethweni wase-Delaware onegunya laseMassachusetts

contact.title: Ulwazi lokuxhumana
contact.content: Uma unemibuzo mayelana nale Migomo noma Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, sicela usithinte ku-: <emailLink>legal@virtualmd.app</emailLink> noma ngekhasi lethu elithi Xhumana nathi.

miscellaneous.title: Okunhlobonhlobo
miscellaneous.entireAgreement: Le Migomo ihlanganisa sonke isivumelwano phakathi kwakho ne-MindScript mayelana nokusetshenziswa Kwesevisi.
miscellaneous.severability: Uma noma yikuphi ukunikezwa kwale Migomo kubhekwa njengokungavumelekile noma njengokungaphoqeleleki, ukunikezwa okusele kuzoqhubeka nokusebenza ngokugcwele.
miscellaneous.waiver: Ukwehluleka kwe-MindScript ukuphoqelela noma yiliphi ilungelo noma ukunikezwa kwale Migomo ngeke kuthathwe njengokuyekwa kwalelo lungelo noma ukunikezwa.
miscellaneous.assignment: Akumele unikeze noma udlulisele le Migomo, ngokusebenza komthetho noma ngenye indlela, ngaphandle kwemvume ebhalwe ngaphambili ye-MindScript.
